title: Rename device - new name in the Notifications
scenario: Custom device name set in Device Settings > General is not reflected in system notifications (disconnect, low battery, firmware updates)
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap on General.
4. Locate the device name field and enter a new custom name (e.g., "My Poly Headset").
6. Disconnect the device (e.g., turn off the headset or move out of range).
7. Observe the system notification that appears for the disconnect event.
8. Reconnect the device and allow the battery to drain to a low level, or simulate a low battery condition.
9. Observe the system notification that appears for low battery.
10. Trigger a firmware update notification (e.g., via the app or device behavior).
11. Observe the system notification that appears for the firmware update.
expected: All system notifications (disconnect, low battery, firmware update) display the new custom name instead of the default device name.
